category_sources: source_facts.description says libprotoident performs application-layer protocol identification for flows.

docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README documents introduction, installation, tools, protocol support, and API notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/LibtraceTeam/libprotoident, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
